'''ngadhobo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:nyctophobe|nyctophobe]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-dh-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nyctophobe|nyctophobe]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| ngadhobo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || ngædhebeth || ngædhebej || ngædhebesh || ngædhebe
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || ngadhodhoboth || ngadhodhoboj || ngadhodhobosh || ngadhodhobo
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || ngadhoboth || ngadhoboj || ngadhobosh || ngadhobo
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || ngadhofbofth || ngadhofbofj || ngadhofbofsh || ngadhofbof
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || ngadhobotho || ngadhobojo || ngadhobosho || ngadhoboko
|-
| [[Patient]] || ngadhoboth || ngadhoboj || ngadhobosh || ngadhobo
|-
| [[Possessive]] || ngadhobothol || ngadhobojol || ngadhoboshol || ngadhobokol
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || ngadhoboothotho || ngadhoboojojo || ngadhobooshosho || ngadhobooko
|-
| [[Dative]] || ngadhobothon || ngadhobojon || ngadhoboshon || ngadhobokon
|-
| [[Speaker]] || ngadhobothooro || ngadhobojooro || ngadhoboshooro || ngadhobokooro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
